name: Blackeyed Peas and Barley
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Blackeyed Peas, Canned (rinsed and drained)
1 cup Nonfat Dry Milk (or substitute with 1 1/4 cups Water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Lightly spray a 1-3/4 quart casserole dish with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
4. Place the mixture in the prepared casserole dish.
5. Cover tightly and bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until barley is tender. Stir once, halfway through cooking time.
6. Remove and discard bay leaf before serving.
